submodules.name: Advanced Text Generator Support
submodules.description:
Advanced Text Generator is a text rendering module that employs Harfbuzz, ICU, and FreeType to deliver comprehensive Unicode support and text shaping capabilities.
With Advanced Text Generator, you can use a wide array of languages and scripts, such as right-to-left (RTL) languages like Arabic and Hebrew.
